analysis: The project currently has a basic structure with HTML, CSS, and JS files. The event.json specifies a black holes theme with animated objects, slides, and pages. The current implementation likely lacks a cohesive cosmic theme, proper animations for black hole visuals, and interactive elements. The CSS needs to be enhanced with dark, cosmic colors, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML should include sections related to black holes, and the JavaScript should handle animations and interactions.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS includes all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented, including the showSlide function, event listeners for new buttons, and functionality for the black hole theme. Fix syntax errors and ensure all event listeners and functionality are properly implemented.
